headline: Is Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ISRG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Intuitive Surgical, Inc. on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ISRG. Intuitive Surgical, Inc.’s share was trading at $412.02 as of June 10th. ISRG’s trailing and forward P/E were 50.06 and 39.68 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) Growth Framework Shows Strong Fundamentals and Potential Technical Inflection Point
summary: Intuitive Surgical reports 21.4% revenue growth, 25.9% EPS growth, strong profitability, and no debt. With a PEG ratio and a 7/10 setup rating, this growth stock nears a potential technical breakout.
